modssync.disconnect: ModsSync updated your mods to match the server. Wait a few seconds for downloads to finish, then fully restart Minecraft and rejoin.
modssync.unauthorized: Unauthorized mods or resource packs detected. ModsSync has scheduled them for removal — fully CLOSE and reopen Minecraft, then rejoin. (You cannot join with disallowed client mods active.)
modssync.restart: ModsSync downloaded the server's mods/packs. Fully restart Minecraft to load them, then rejoin.
